message:
feat(export): add --pages-subtitle CLI flag, wire subtitle through pages export, and clean up stale SQLite chunks

Expose the subtitle field (already supported by the pages wizard) via
--pages-subtitle for non-interactive export flows.  Add stale chunk
directory cleanup in emit_bootstrap_config so re-exports that drop
below the chunk threshold don't leave orphaned chunk directories.
Apply rustfmt to git_history test fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
